IT service management software for ticke: IT service management software for ticketing, asset management, and IT operations.
Your Freshservice API key from Profile S: Your Freshservice API key from Profile Settings.
\nTo get your API key:\n1. Log in to you:
To get your API key:
1. Log in to your **Freshservice** account as an agent.
2. Click your **profile picture** in the top-right corner.
3. Go to **Profile Settings**.
4. Your API key is displayed on the right side of the page.

For the domain, enter only the subdomain. For example, if your URL is **mycompany.freshservice.com**, enter **mycompany**.

Triggers when a new ticket is created in: Triggers when a new ticket is created in Freshservice.
Triggers when an existing ticket is upda: Triggers when an existing ticket is updated in Freshservice.
Triggers when a new requester (user) is: Triggers when a new requester (user) is created in Freshservice.

Triggers when a new change request is cr: Triggers when a new change request is created in Freshservice.
Triggers when an existing change request: Triggers when an existing change request is updated in Freshservice. Note: newly created changes may also fire this trigger because their updated_at matches created_at.
